human_verification.notes: Reviewed reporting boundary, evidence traceability, metric-definition governance, and escalation posture for education-and-research lane specificity.

review_notes: Scenario suite covers normal reporting, approval blocking, metric disputes, privacy/consent gaps, and ethics/authority shifts.
All required abilities are mapped and pass with declared escalation behavior.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary controls prevent grading, ethics-board, legal, and financial-overreach while preserving reporting-lane authority.
All reporting outputs include source ties, metric-definition handling, and uncertainty markers.
Deployment notes define required tenant artifacts and explicit rollback/monitoring behavior.
notes: Runtime remains specification-based and should be promoted to trusted built only with explicit governance approval.
Tenant-supplied FERPA role, metric dictionary, and approval-owner mappings are required for high-confidence outcomes.
